text.title: Tech Debt Management Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes per-item by score band → strategy → exit + gate present. Branches name observable plan features.

decision-tree.root-question: Are prerequisites satisfied: scored register, CI infra, threshold, owner-assignable?

branch.when: prereqs_met == true AND score_below_threshold == false AND strategy_inconsistent == true
prereqs_met == true AND score_below_threshold == false AND strategy_inconsistent == false AND exit_unobservable == true
prereqs_met == true AND score_below_threshold == false AND strategy_inconsistent == false AND exit_unobservable == false AND gate_non_mechanical == true
prereqs_met == true AND score_below_threshold == false AND strategy_inconsistent == false AND exit_unobservable == false AND gate_non_mechanical == false

text.example: prereqs_met=true → score=80 above threshold 30 → strategy=strangler-fig matches broad-high → exit_criterion="100% traffic switched for 2 weeks" observable → gate.kind=loc-cap mechanical → verdict=adopt-plan (ref run-the-checklist).
